description: Deployment targets the platform can provision into. Owned by UIS, vendored into TMP.

targets.name: Rancher Desktop
targets.description: Local Kubernetes cluster on the developer's laptop. ArgoCD watches the repo and deploys on every push.

targets.name: Azure Container Apps
targets.description: Serverless containers on Azure. Managed PostgreSQL via Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server.

targets.name: Azure AKS
targets.description: Managed Kubernetes on Azure. Full K8s cluster with ArgoCD or direct deployment via azure/k8s-deploy.

targets.name: Ubuntu K8s
targets.description: Kubernetes on Ubuntu — bare metal server, virtual machine, or cloud instance. UIS installs K8s and configures the cluster.

targets.name: Raspberry Pi
targets.description: Kubernetes on ARM hardware. UIS installs a lightweight K8s distribution on the Pi.
